creator: ale_sagra@hotmail.com
text:
Hey Nuno,
correct, adding the test_dependcy line in Makefile and running `make maketest`, I get:

Installing py39-pytest-7.1.3,1...
===>   py39-pymemcache-4.0.0 depends on package: py39-pytest>=0 - found
===>   Returning to build of py39-pymemcache-4.0.0
===>   py39-pymemcache-4.0.0 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/python3.9 - found
ERROR: usage: __main__.py [options] [file_or_dir] [file_or_dir] [...]
__main__.py: error: unrecognized arguments: --cov=pymemcache --cov-config=setup.cfg --cov-report=xml --cov-report=term-missing
  inifile: /var/tmp/ports/usr/ports/databases/py-pymemcache/work-py39/pymemcache-4.0.0/setup.cfg
  rootdir: /var/tmp/ports/usr/ports/databases/py-pymemcache/work-py39/pymemcache-4.0.0

*** Error code 4

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/databases/py-pymemcache

is this the same error you are getting? Thank you
